rawAssistant: The moonwell... a place of quiet reflection, where the gentle lapping of its waters against the shore seems to soothe the soul. It's a sanctuary I've tended for many years, watching the phases of the moon and feeling the world slow its pace beneath my care. The well itself is an ancient thing, with roots that delve deep into the earth and a spirit that whispers secrets to those who listen. Come, sit with me by the water, and I'll share more about what you've seen on your journey...
